verdict: Lattice is the OFF-DIAGONAL adversarial WORST case: every non-lattice config tested has K_floor~1<<13 (lattice admissible)<<20.5(K*); perturbing off-lattice reduces K_floor. Generic non-lattice R_lead~0.08 (margin x12). The lattice T7 dominates non-lattice competitors of the R_lead mechanism. Residual to C_full = EXTREMAL conjecture (K_floor maximised by arithmetic structure), T2 with strong evidence, NOT arbitrary-Q DR-2. Window bounded by physical I_c~2.5e-3 (R-029), not a proof gap. No tier change.

claims.name: threshold_Kstar_about_20p5
claims.detail: (const=(9/4)u_eff^2 B_max (2/r_R)=23.20 N-INDEPENDENT; K*=1/(const*I)-1=20.55 is the universal R_lead<1 threshold; lattice admissible K_floor<=13<K*)

claims.detail: (random real-antipodal NON-lattice K_floor={12: 0.75, 20: 0.85, 40: 0.93, 60: 0.95}, all<2<<13; R_lead~0.090, margin x11)

claims.name: lattice_is_offdiag_worst_case
claims.detail: (exact-BCC K_floor=1.75 > jittered-BCC(10%) K_floor=0.92: leaving the lattice REDUCES the additive-energy floor. The floor is maximised by arithmetic coincidence => lattice is the adversarial worst case of the R_lead mechanism, already closed at T'<=13)

claims.name: quantitative_sanity_extremal_evidence
claims.detail: (worst NON-lattice K_floor=0.95<13=lattice admissible<20.6=K*; worst non-lattice R_lead=0.090<0.65=lattice R_lead<1. STRONG EVIDENCE for the extremal conjecture 'K_floor maximised within the arithmetic class'; falsifier: real-antipodal non-lattice with K_floor>13. Probes OFF-DIAGONAL only; (D)/(S) non-lattice extensions not probed; window bounded by physical I_c~2.5e-3)
